{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Karoshan hostages
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax is anxious to check on the [[Karoshan hostages]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30">''The Pilot'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon events]]
